signature.instructions: Examine the supplied passage and determine whether it is more likely to have been generated by an AI or written by a human. Consider indicators such as formulaic structure, repetitive phrasing, generic or overly polished language, abrupt inconsistencies, fabricated specificity, and natural variation in style. Make the best binary judgment from the text alone, even if the evidence is uncertain. Return exactly `AI` or `Human` with no additional explanation.

fields.description: True for AI-generated text; otherwise False
